title: Aptitude: Letter and Symbol Series - Q6

content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

If all the digits are dropped, which of the following is third to the right of the eleventh from the right end? 

(a) ^ 
(b) 8 
(c) Z 
(d) & 
(e) T

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

(c) Z Explanation:

Given Series - * E 7 O & 6 ^ 4 Z 5 * 3 9 T ! D # 2 $ U
After dropping digits - * E O & ^ Z * T ! D # $ U
So, eleventh from the right end – O
Therefore, third to the right of O – Z
